hooks.command:
python3 -c "import subprocess,json; hw=subprocess.run(['bash','.devcontainer/scripts/check-hardware.sh'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=30); sw=subprocess.run(['bash','.devcontainer/scripts/check-software.sh'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=30); ctx=hw.stdout.strip()+'

'+sw.stdout.strip(); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'SessionStart','additionalContext':'Environment status (auto-checked at session start):

'+ctx}}))"

python3 -c "import sys, json, subprocess, os; data=sys.stdin.buffer.read(); cwd=json.loads(data).get('cwd') or '.'; script=os.path.join(cwd,'.claude','hooks','hw-lock-waiter-notice.sh'); r=subprocess.run([script],input=data,stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.PIPE) if os.path.isfile(script) else None; sys.stdout.buffer.write(r.stdout if r else b'{}'); sys.stderr.buffer.write(r.stderr if r else b''); sys.exit(r.returncode if r else 0)"

python3 -c "import sys, json, subprocess, os; data=sys.stdin.buffer.read(); cwd=json.loads(data).get('cwd') or '.'; script=os.path.join(cwd,'.claude','hooks','hw-lock-guard.sh'); r=subprocess.run([script],input=data,stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.PIPE) if os.path.isfile(script) else None; sys.stdout.buffer.write(r.stdout if r else json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','permissionDecision':'allow'}}).encode()); sys.stderr.buffer.write(r.stderr if r else b''); sys.exit(r.returncode if r else 0)"
